/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libvehicle_bridge.so -o libvehicle_bridge.so CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/vehicle_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/register_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/fpga_racecar_verilog/obj_dir/Vv_car_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/fpga_racecar_verilog/obj_dir/Vv_car_controller__Syms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/fpga_racecar_verilog/obj_dir/Vv_car_controller___024root__DepSet_h3cdc1066__0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/fpga_racecar_verilog/obj_dir/Vv_car_controller___024root__DepSet_h66e2c5ba__0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/fpga_racecar_verilog/obj_dir/Vv_car_controller___024root__DepSet_h66e2c5ba__0__Slow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/fpga_racecar_verilog/obj_dir/Vv_car_controller___024root__Slow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/usr/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vehicle_bridge.dir/usr/share/verilator/include/verilated_threads.cpp.o  libracecar_core.a /home/bengrove/Documents/great_work/fpga_racecar/godot-cpp/bin/libgodot-cpp.linux.template_debug.x86_64.a
